name: Rich Chocolate Frosting
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Southern Living
Preparation Time: 0:15
Combine chocolate morsels, half-and-half, and butter in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat, stirring until melted and smooth. Remove from heat and blend in powdered sugar. Set saucepan in ice. Beat at medium speed of an electric mixer until frosting holds its shape. Yield: about 3 cups.
